papers.title: Stakeholder-engagement on assessment of implementation considerations for food-policy interventions for prevention of overweight and obesity in Kenya and evaluation of the engagement process
papers.translated_title: 在肯尼亚，针对预防超重和肥胖的食品政策干预措施实施考量评估中的利益相关方参与，以及参与过程的评估
papers.author: Wanjau, M. N.
papers.summary: Background Global prevalence of overweight and obesity continues to rise, underscoring the need for context-specific evidence to guide policy. Our previous modelling showed that promoting indigenous foods, a 20% sugar-sweetened beverage (SSB) tax, and kilojoule menu labelling in Kenyan restaurants were health-promoting and cost-effective. Cost-effectiveness evidence is strengthened when considered alongside broader policy implementation considerations. This study engaged stakeholders to assess implementation considerations and evaluate the engagement process. Methods Consistent with the Assessing Cost-Effectiveness approach, we engaged stakeholders recruited through purposive and snowball sampling. Through deliberative dialogue at a hybrid workshop, stakeholders assessed implementation considerations using a colour-coded scoring tool and evaluated the engagement process via an anonymous survey across seven domains, with responses analysed thematically. Results Implementation considerations were rated favourably across the interventions, with feasibility, reach and impact, affordability, acceptability, and sustainability assessed as medium or high. Industry acceptability and affordability of kilojoule labelling, and industry acceptability of SSB tax, were rated low. Equity scores varied. Stakeholders proposed complementary measures that could raise low ratings. The engagement process was positively evaluated; clear stakeholder roles were a key strength, while competing commitments limited participation. Conclusion Findings provide context-specific evidence for Kenyan fiscal debates and enhance stakeholder-engaged research in LMICs.
papers.translated_summary: 背景 全球超重和肥胖患病率持续上升，凸显了需要因地制宜的证据来指导政策。我们之前的模型研究表明，在肯尼亚餐馆推广本土食品、征收20%含糖饮料税以及实施千焦菜单标签，具有健康促进和成本效益优势。当结合更广泛的政策实施考量时，成本效益证据的可靠性得以增强。本研究通过利益相关方参与，评估了实施考量因素及参与过程。 方法 遵循成本效益评估方法，我们通过目的性抽样和滚雪球抽样招募利益相关方。在混合式研讨会上通过协商对话，利益相关方使用颜色编码评分工具评估实施考量因素，并通过涵盖七个维度的匿名调查评估参与过程，对回复进行主题分析。 结果 各项干预措施的实施考量因素均获得积极评价，可行性、覆盖范围与影响、可负担性、可接受性和可持续性被评为中等或较高水平。千焦标签的行业可接受性和可负担性，以及含糖饮料税的行业可接受性被评为较低水平。公平性评分存在差异。利益相关方提出了可提升低评分项目的补充措施。参与过程获得积极评价；明确的利益相关方角色是主要优势，而多重职责冲突限制了参与度。 结论 研究结果为肯尼亚财政政策辩论提供了因地制宜的证据，并加强了中低收入国家中利益相关方参与式研究。

papers.title: Emergence and co-circulation of Monkeypox virus Clade Ia and Clade Ib in South Kivu, Democratic Republic of the Congo, January to May 2026
papers.translated_title: 2026年1月至5月，刚果民主共和国南基伍省出现猴痘病毒Clade Ia和Clade Ib并共同流行。
papers.author: Murhula, L.
papers.summary: In September 2023, the first infections with a novel lineage of mpox were detected in South Kivu. Since then, the virus has spread regionally, nationally and internationally. As part of continued efforts to understand the mpox ecology and epidemiology, the South Kivu district of public health and partners have set up systematic case finding and follow-up, including strain characterisation through PCR and sequencing. Samples were collected from 595 hospitalized patients with a confirmed mpox virus infection. A clade differentiating RT-PCR showed that 545 (92%) of samples were positive for clade Ib but also remarkably that Clade Ia infections were diagnosed for the first time in South Kivu. First detected in cases in week 7 in Kamituga, 50 cases were identified over the whole study period (8,40% of all cases). Phylogenetic analysis of initial cases revealed introductions of clade Ia into the South Kivu province alongside the continuation of the clade Ib mpox virus outbreak. These findings underscore the increasing complexity of clade I mpox virus outbreaks in the DRC.
papers.translated_summary: 2023年9月，南基伍省首次检测到新型猴痘病毒谱系感染。此后，该病毒在地区、国家和国际层面持续传播。作为持续了解猴痘生态学和流行病学工作的一部分，南基伍省公共卫生部门及合作伙伴建立了系统性病例发现和随访机制，包括通过PCR和测序进行毒株鉴定。研究团队从595名确诊猴痘病毒感染的住院患者中采集样本。通过分化型RT-PCR检测发现，545份样本（92%）为Ib分支阳性，值得注意的是，南基伍省首次确诊Ia分支感染病例。该分支最早在卡米图加第7周病例中检出，整个研究期间共发现50例（占全部病例的8.40%）。对初始病例的系统发育分析显示，在Ib分支猴痘病毒疫情持续蔓延的同时，Ia分支已传入南基伍省。这些发现凸显了刚果民主共和国I分支猴痘病毒疫情日益复杂的态势。

papers.title: Holder-Optimized Elastography Reveals a Reproducible Pressure-Sensitive High-Velocity Area Phenomenon in Breast Cancer-Related Lymphedema
papers.translated_title: 支架优化弹性成像揭示乳腺癌相关淋巴水肿中可重复的压力敏感高速区域现象
papers.author: Hoe, Z.-Y.
papers.summary: Background: Breast cancer-related lymphedema (BCRL) requires repeated assessment, but lymphoscintigraphy is unsuitable for such short-interval monitoring. Conventional superficial shear-wave elastography (SWE) is limited by pressure-related acquisition artifacts that may suppress diagnostically relevant signal. Purpose: To determine whether Holder-Optimized Elastography (HOE) enables reproducible visualization of a pressure-sensitive high-velocity area (HVA) phenomenon not reliably demonstrable with conventional handheld SWE and whether visual HVA burden is associated with lymphoscintigraphy-defined obstruction severity. Materials and Methods: In this prospective, single-center observational study, Substudy 1 (go/no-go feasibility; 15 women with BCRL; mean age, 61.6 years +/- 11.8 [SD]; with HVA-positive cases selected by design) compared paired HOE and handheld ARFI-SWE acquisitions at 240 matched anatomic sites. Substudy 2 (cross-sectional clinical association; 110 women; mean age, 60.7 years +/- 10.8 [SD]) evaluated visually assessed HOE-based HVA burden against lymphoscintigraphy-defined obstruction severity using the Taiwan Lymphoscintigraphy Staging (TLS) system. Results: In Substudy 1, HVAs were visible at 125 of 240 HOE sites (52.1%) versus 17 of 240 handheld sites (7.1%); 108 sites were positive only on HOE and none only on handheld imaging (exact McNemar test, P < .001). In Substudy 2, inter-reader agreement was acceptable to good for image-level HVA presence ({kappa} = 0.718) and count (ICC(2,1) = 0.756). Global Mean (GM) yielded the highest area under the ROC curve (AUC) for any obstruction versus no obstruction (AUC, 0.837; 95% CI [0.755, 0.920]); Joint-Excluded Mean Difference (JE{Delta}M) yielded the highest AUC for total versus partial obstruction (AUC, 0.865; 95% CI [0.730, 1.000]). Total-versus-partial estimates should be interpreted cautiously because the total-obstruction group comprised 12 participants. Conclusion: HOE enables reproducible visualization of a pressure-sensitive subcutaneous HVA phenomenon not reliably demonstrated with conventional handheld SWE. Visual HVA burden provides clinically meaningful, though incomplete, information regarding lymphatic obstruction severity in BCRL, supporting HOE as a low-pressure acquisition framework for future quantitative SWE assessment.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：乳腺癌相关淋巴水肿（BCRL）需要反复评估，但淋巴闪烁显像不适用于这种短间隔监测。传统浅表剪切波弹性成像（SWE）受压力相关采集伪影限制，可能抑制具有诊断意义的信号。目的：确定优化手持弹性成像（HOE）能否可重复显示传统手持SWE无法可靠呈现的压力敏感高速区（HVA）现象，以及视觉HVA负荷是否与淋巴闪烁显像定义的梗阻严重程度相关。材料与方法：本前瞻性单中心观察性研究包含两个子研究：子研究1（可行性评估；15例BCRL女性患者，平均年龄61.6岁±11.8[SD]，按设计选择HVA阳性病例）在240个匹配解剖部位比较配对HOE与手持ARFI-SWE采集结果；子研究2（横断面临床关联；110例女性，平均年龄60.7岁±10.8[SD]）采用台湾淋巴闪烁显像分期（TLS）系统评估基于HOE的视觉HVA负荷与淋巴闪烁显像定义的梗阻严重程度。结果：子研究1中，HOE在240个部位中125个（52.1%）显示HVA，手持设备仅17个（7.1%）；108个部位仅HOE阳性，无仅手持成像阳性（精确McNemar检验，P<.001）。子研究2中，图像级HVA存在（κ=0.718）和计数（ICC(2,1)=0.756）的阅片者间一致性可接受至良好。全局均值（GM）对任何梗阻与无梗阻的ROC曲线下面积（AUC）最高（AUC=0.837；95%CI[0.755,0.920]）；排除关节均值差（JEΔM）对完全梗阻与部分梗阻的AUC最高（AUC=0.865；95%CI[0.730,1.000]）。完全与部分梗阻的估计值需谨慎解读，因完全梗阻组仅12例参与者。结论：HOE可重复显示传统手持SWE无法可靠呈现的压力敏感皮下HVA现象。视觉HVA负荷可提供BCRL淋巴梗阻严重程度的临床有意义但非完全信息，支持HOE作为未来定量SWE评估的低压采集框架。

papers.title: Frailty, initial attrition and the potential use of novel platinum-free options for non-small-cell lung cancer in the real-world setting
papers.translated_title: 在真实世界环境下，非小细胞肺癌的虚弱状态、初始治疗脱落率及新型无铂方案的潜在应用
papers.author: Christopoulos, P.
papers.summary: Background: How frailty limits initial therapy in non-small-cell lung cancer (NSCLC) remains poorly understood and was the focus of this study. Methods: 2592 consecutive patients with metastatic NSCLC between 2018-2023 in Heidelberg were retrospectively analyzed. Results: Systemic therapy was initiated in 74% of patients with PD-L1 0-49% (n=1306) vs. 79% with PD-L1 [≥]50% (n=507, p=0.014), in whom the availability of monoimmunotherapy reduced best supportive care by own choice (1.8% vs. 4.5%, p=0.005), or for medical reasons (mBSC 14.6% vs. 17.8%, p=0.11), while early death remained unchanged (ca. 4%). 70% of patients receiving mBSC were initially treatable but suffered deterioration associated with comorbidities, metastatic burden, or protracted workup (p<0.001). The atezolizumab Summary of Medicinal Product Characteristics (SmPC) criteria, i.e. >80 years, or ECOG performance status (PS) [≥]3, or comorbidities with PS [≥]2 or age [≥]70, were fulfilled by 38% (n=501) and associated with >3x higher risk of death without therapy (230/501), as well as higher toxicity and shorter survival under platinum, which for a platinum dose ratio [≤]60% across 4 cycles (9% of 1306) resembled that with single-agent chemotherapy (median 5.1 months, p<0.001). SmPC criteria correlated better with platinum use than comorbidity scores, but predictability for individual patients remained modest (AUC 0.71, p<0.001). Conclusions: The high initial attrition of 26% in NSCLC improved with availability of monoimmunotherapy, but also requires better patient workflows for further mitigation. Adoption of the SmPC criteria could support identification of patients at risk for mBSC or platinum overtreatment to enhance utilization of novel platinum-free first-line options.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：虚弱如何限制非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）的初始治疗仍知之甚少，本研究聚焦于此。方法：回顾性分析2018-2023年间海德堡2592例连续转移性NSCLC患者。结果：PD-L1 0-49%组（n=1306）中74%患者启动全身治疗，而PD-L1≥50%组（n=507）为79%（p=0.014），后者因单药免疫治疗的可及性，自主选择最佳支持治疗的比例降低（1.8% vs. 4.5%，p=0.005），因医学原因接受最佳支持治疗的比例为14.6% vs. 17.8%（p=0.11），早期死亡率保持不变（约4%）。接受医学原因最佳支持治疗的患者中70%初始可治疗，但因合并症、肿瘤负荷或诊断流程延长导致病情恶化（p<0.001）。阿替利珠单抗药品特征摘要标准（即>80岁、ECOG体能状态≥3、或合并症伴PS≥2或年龄≥70岁）适用于38%患者（n=501），其未接受治疗死亡风险增加3倍以上（230/501），且铂类治疗下毒性更高、生存期更短；当4周期铂类剂量比≤60%（占1306例的9%）时，生存期与单药化疗相似（中位5.1个月，p<0.001）。药品特征摘要标准与铂类使用相关性优于合并症评分，但对个体患者的预测能力有限（AUC 0.71，p<0.001）。结论：NSCLC初始治疗缺失率高达26%，单药免疫治疗的可及性改善了该现状，但仍需优化患者诊疗流程以进一步降低。采用药品特征摘要标准有助于识别医学原因最佳支持治疗或铂类过度治疗风险患者，从而促进新型无铂一线方案的应用。

papers.title: Detection of Measles Virus RNA in Wastewater: Monitoring for Wild-Type and Vaccine-Derived Strains in a National Preparedness Trial
papers.translated_title: 废水中麻疹病毒RNA的检测：国家防范试验中对野生型和疫苗衍生株的监测
papers.author: Ahmed, W.
papers.summary: Wastewater surveillance (WWS) is established as a vital tool for monitoring polio and SARS-CoV-2 with potential to improve surveillance for many other infectious diseases. This study evaluated the feasibility of detecting measles virus (MeV) RNA in wastewater as part of a national WS preparedness trial in Southeast Queensland, Australia, from March to June 2025. Composite and passive sampling methods were employed in parallel at three wastewater treatment plants serving populations between 230,000 and 584,000. Nucleic acids were extracted and analyzed using RT-qPCR targeting MeV N and M genes to distinguish wild-type and vaccine strains. MeV RNA were detected in both 24-hour composite and passive samples on May 26-27, 2025 from the largest catchment of 584,000 which also included an international airport. No measles cases were reported in this city or region within 4 weeks of the WS detections. These were confirmed as vaccine-derived measles virus (MeVV) strain via specific RT-qPCR assay. Extraction recoveries varied (11.5% to 70.5%), with passive sampling showing higher efficiency. This is the first report of use of passive samples for detection of MeV. These findings are consistent with other studies reporting WWS results of both MeVV genotype A and wild type genotype B and/or D. It demonstrates the potential for sensitive MeV WWS with rapid differentiation of MeVV from wild type MeV shedding, including in airport transport hubs and with different sample types. Use of WWS could strengthen measles surveillance by enabling rapid detection of MeV RNA and supporting outbreak preparedness and response. This requires optimised methods which are specific to or differentiate wild-type MeV from MeVV. Furthermore, the successful detection of MeV using passive sampling in this study highlights its potential for deployment in diverse global contexts which may include non-sewered settings.
papers.translated_summary: 废水监测（WWS）已成为监测脊髓灰质炎和SARS-CoV-2的重要工具，并有望改善对其他多种传染病的监测。本研究评估了在澳大利亚昆士兰东南部2025年3月至6月国家废水监测准备试验中检测麻疹病毒（MeV）RNA的可行性。在三个服务人口23万至58.4万的污水处理厂同时采用混合采样和被动采样方法。提取核酸后，通过靶向MeV N和M基因的RT-qPCR分析区分野生型和疫苗株。2025年5月26-27日，在服务人口58.4万（含国际机场）的最大汇水区中，24小时混合样本和被动样本均检测到MeV RNA。该城市及周边地区在废水检测阳性后4周内未报告麻疹病例。通过特异性RT-qPCR检测确认这些为疫苗衍生麻疹病毒（MeVV）株。提取回收率在11.5%至70.5%之间，被动采样效率更高。这是首次报道使用被动样本检测MeV。该结果与其他研究报道的MeVV基因型A及野生型基因型B和/或D的WWS结果一致，证明敏感MeV WWS可快速区分MeVV与野生型MeV脱落，包括在机场交通枢纽及不同样本类型中的应用。WWS可通过快速检测MeV RNA加强麻疹监测，支持疫情准备和应对，但需优化针对或区分野生型MeV与MeVV的方法。此外，本研究中被动采样成功检测MeV，凸显其在全球不同环境（包括非下水道区域）的部署潜力。

papers.title: Multimodal evidence for a mechanistic model of working memory deficits in schizophrenia
papers.translated_title: 精神分裂症工作记忆缺陷机制模型的多模态证据
papers.author: Mäki-Marttunen, T.
papers.summary: Working memory (WM) deficits are central to schizophrenia (SCZ), yet their mechanistic basis remains unclear. We combined computational modelling with genetic, transcriptomic, behavioural, and fMRI data to construct a mechanistic account of WM impairment in SCZ. Post-mortem RNA expression from prefrontal and anterior cingulate cortex (ACC) was integrated with single-cell, network, and synaptic plasticity models to show how SCZ-related changes in ion channel-encoding and plasticity-regulating genes alter sustained delay-period activity and long-term potentiation, suggesting an impairment of WM. The model predictions were supported by behavioural WM test (letter-number sequencing) results and polygenic risk scores for SCZ based on ion channel and plasticity gene sets. Mendelian randomization, together with nominally significant single-gene risk analyses, implicated specific ion channel genes, particularly CACNA1I, as putatively causal for both SCZ liability and WM deficits. fMRI N-back data supported ACC-specific delay-period impairments. These multimodal findings highlight candidate, druggable mechanisms for cognition-focused interventions in SCZ.
papers.translated_summary: 工作记忆缺陷是精神分裂症的核心特征，但其机制基础仍不明确。我们结合计算建模与遗传、转录组、行为及功能磁共振成像数据，构建了精神分裂症工作记忆损伤的机制性解释。将前额叶和前扣带回皮质的死后RNA表达与单细胞、网络及突触可塑性模型整合，揭示了精神分裂症相关离子通道编码基因和可塑性调控基因的变化如何改变持续延迟期活动及长时程增强，提示工作记忆受损。模型预测得到行为学工作记忆测试（字母-数字排序）结果及基于离子通道和可塑性基因集的精神分裂症多基因风险评分的支持。孟德尔随机化结合名义显著的单基因风险分析，提示特定离子通道基因（尤其是CACNA1I）可能是精神分裂症易感性与工作记忆缺陷的潜在因果因素。功能磁共振成像N-back数据支持前扣带回皮质特异性延迟期损伤。这些多模态发现为精神分裂症认知导向干预提供了候选的可药物化机制。

papers.title: Infoxmed2.0-27B: Instruction Tuning, Preference Alignment, and GRPO-Based Reward Model Training for Medical LLMs
papers.translated_title: Infoxmed2.0-27B：面向医学大语言模型的指令微调、偏好对齐与基于GRPO的奖励模型训练
papers.author: Xie, J.
papers.summary: Abstract-Large language models (LLMs) [1], [2] have demon strated remarkable capabilities across general domains, yet their application in specialized medical contexts demands rigorous domain adaptation [3], [4]. We present Infoxmed2.0-27B, a medical foundation model built upon Qwen3.5-27B [5] through a comprehensive multi-stage post-training pipeline: (1) proprietary medical data synthesis from a MySQL database with MedicalCategoryTree organization, medical PhD team validation, Chinese RoBERTa [6] semantic deduplication, and API-assisted language refinement; (2) instruction supervised fine-tuning of Qwen3.5- 27B via LoRA [7] (r = 8, = 32) using MS-Swift [8], producing iterations Infoxmed2.0.0[->]2.0.2[->]2.0.4; (3) Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) [9] on 6,283 curated medical preference pairs [10] using DPO-RPO loss ({beta} = 0.3, RPO = 0.1) across eight progressive training iterations (v0-v7); and (4) parallel Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) [11]-based medical reward model training on Qwen3.5 combining internal rule-based reward functions with external DeepSeek signals. Comprehensive evaluations under a uniform LLM-as-Judge [12] framework with GPT-5.4 demonstrate 77.0% accuracy (mean quality score +7.18) on MedMCQA [10] and +2.59 on HLE, with pipeline progression from +6.69 (base) to +7.06 (SFT) to +7.18 (final).
papers.translated_summary: 摘要——大型语言模型（LLM）[1][2]在通用领域展现出卓越能力，但其在专业医疗场景中的应用需要严格的领域适配[3][4]。我们提出Infoxmed2.0-27B，这是一个基于Qwen3.5-27B[5]构建的医学基础模型，通过全面的多阶段后训练流程实现：（1）从MySQL数据库中利用MedicalCategoryTree组织专有医疗数据合成，经医学博士团队验证、中文RoBERTa[6]语义去重及API辅助语言精炼；（2）使用MS-Swift[8]通过LoRA[7]（r=8，=32）对Qwen3.5-27B进行指令监督微调，生成迭代版本Infoxmed2.0.0[-＞]2.0.2[-＞]2.0.4；（3）在6283个精选医疗偏好对[10]上采用DPO-RPO损失（β=0.3，RPO=0.1）进行直接偏好优化（DPO）[9]，历经八个渐进训练迭代（v0-v7）；（4）基于Qwen3.5的并行组相对策略优化（GRPO）[11]医疗奖励模型训练，结合内部基于规则的奖励函数与外部DeepSeek信号。在统一LLM-as-Judge[12]框架下使用GPT-5.4进行的综合评估显示，MedMCQA[10]准确率达77.0%（平均质量评分+7.18），HLE评分+2.59，流程从+6.69（基础）提升至+7.06（SFT）再到+7.18（最终）。

papers.title: Antifungal use with and without fungal diagnoses in septic shock across U.S. hospitals, 2022-2024
papers.translated_title: 2022-2024年美国医院脓毒性休克患者中伴或不伴真菌诊断的抗真菌药物使用情况
papers.author: Flick, R. J.
papers.summary: Septic shock caused by fungal organisms is characterized by high mortality and diagnostic complexity. We used the Premier Healthcare Database to characterize antifungal use and fungal diagnoses among adults with septic shock requiring vasopressors admitted between October 2022 through July 2024. Among 12.8 million admission at 886 hospitals, 554,948 met septic shock criteria and were included for analysis. A fungal diagnosis was established in 11,405 (2.1%) of encounters; of these, 3,565 (31.3%) received intravenous antifungal therapy within one day of vasopressor initiation. In the overall cohort, antifungal therapy was initiated in 29,824 (5.5%) within one day of vasopressor initiation; of these, 3,656 (12.2%) were ultimately diagnosed with a fungal infection. In the 116 hospitals reporting microbiological data, a subgroup of 489 encounters with septic shock and culture-confirmed candidemia was identified. In this subgroup, intravenous antifungal therapy was initiated in 43.8% within one day, 63.8% within three days, and 78.9% within seven days. These findings highlight a profound decoupling between fungal diagnosis and treatment--few patients receiving antifungals were diagnosed with an infection that would be treated by these agents, while less than half of patients with septic shock and candidemia received timely treatment. Strategies for greater precision in empiric antifungal use in septic shock are needed to improve safety, stewardship, and outcomes.
papers.translated_summary: 真菌引起的脓毒性休克具有高死亡率和诊断复杂性的特点。我们利用Premier医疗数据库，分析了2022年10月至2024年7月期间需使用血管升压药的成人脓毒性休克患者的抗真菌药物使用情况及真菌诊断结果。在886家医院的1280万例住院患者中，554,948例符合脓毒性休克标准并被纳入分析。其中11,405例（2.1%）确诊真菌感染；在这些病例中，3,565例（31.3%）在开始使用血管升压药后一天内接受了静脉抗真菌治疗。在整个队列中，29,824例（5.5%）在开始使用血管升压药后一天内启动了抗真菌治疗；其中3,656例（12.2%）最终被确诊为真菌感染。在报告微生物学数据的116家医院中，识别出489例脓毒性休克合并培养确诊念珠菌血症的亚组。该亚组中，43.8%在一天内、63.8%在三天内、78.9%在七天内启动了静脉抗真菌治疗。这些发现凸显了真菌诊断与治疗之间的严重脱节——接受抗真菌治疗的患者中，仅少数被确诊为需使用这些药物的感染，而脓毒性休克合并念珠菌血症患者中，不足半数接受了及时治疗。为提高脓毒性休克经验性抗真菌用药的安全性、管理效能及临床结局，亟需制定更精准的治疗策略。

papers.title: Statins May Not be Associated with a Reduction in Primary Cardiovascular Events in Patients with Systemic Lupus Erythematosus
papers.translated_title: 他汀类药物可能与系统性红斑狼疮患者主要心血管事件减少无关
papers.author: Goren, L. R.
papers.summary: ABSTRACT Importance: Cardiovascular disease (CVD) is a leading cause of morbidity and mortality in patients with Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE), due to both traditional CVD risk factors and SLE specific factors. Although statins are first-line therapy for primary prevention of CVD in the general population, it is unclear whether statins protect against first time cardiovascular events (CVEs) in patients with SLE. Objective: Determine whether statins are protective in primary prevention of CVEs among patients with SLE. Design, setting, and participants: This cohort study is a retrospective analysis of a well-characterized, prospective cohort of patients with SLE with patient follow-up beginning in 2013. Main outcome and measures: CVEs were defined as the occurrence of myocardial infarction, thrombotic stroke, onset of angina, or coronary bypass procedure. Statin use in the prior year was quantified based on standardized defined daily doses (DDD). Rates of occurrence were compared using pooled logistic regression. A multivariable model was performed to adjust for possible confounders. Results: The analysis was based on 8708 person-years of follow-up from 1396 cohort participants: 1283 (92%) were women, 567 (41%) Black, and 665 (48%) White. Patients were stratified by use of statin within the last year: none, < standard DDD, or [≥] standard DDD. The rate of events per 1000 person-years was respectively 5.3, 8.5, and 8.0 (p=0.31) within these 3 groups, suggesting potential lack of protective effect of statin treatment. The rates of CVEs among statin versus non-statin users remained the same after adjusting for and stratifying by total cholesterol level (p=0.18). Significantly higher rates of CVEs occurred among those with body mass index (BMI) 25-30 kg/m^2 (p=0.0066) and those prescribed [≥] 10 mg/day of prednisone (p=0.0003). Multivariable analysis also suggested a potential lack of protective effect of statins against CVEs (OR 1.48; 95% CI, 0.79-2.75; p=0.21883) and diabetes mellitus was found to be independently associated with an increased risk for development of CVEs (OR 4.48; 95% CI 1.99-10.08; p=0.00029). Conclusion and Relevance: Among patients with SLE, statin use may not be protective in primary prevention of CVEs, regardless of statin exposure. Prednisone use, history of diabetes mellitus, and elevated BMI were drivers of increased cardiovascular risk in univariate analysis. Diabetes mellitus persisted as an independent risk factor for CVEs in a multivariable model. Our work reinforces findings from clinical trials which have shown no reduction in subclinical measures of atherosclerosis with statin use among patients with SLE, as well as a mechanistic substudy which demonstrated that statins are ineffective in normalizing the pro-atherogenic changes induced by SLE.
papers.translated_summary: 摘要 重要性：心血管疾病是系统性红斑狼疮患者发病和死亡的主要原因，既源于传统心血管风险因素，也与系统性红斑狼疮特异性因素相关。尽管他汀类药物在普通人群中是一级预防心血管疾病的一线疗法，但其能否预防系统性红斑狼疮患者首次发生心血管事件尚不明确。 目的：确定他汀类药物是否对系统性红斑狼疮患者的心血管事件一级预防具有保护作用。 设计、背景与参与者：本队列研究对2013年开始随访的、特征明确的系统性红斑狼疮前瞻性队列进行回顾性分析。 主要结局与指标：心血管事件定义为心肌梗死、血栓性卒中、心绞痛发作或冠状动脉搭桥手术。根据标准化限定日剂量量化前一年他汀类药物使用情况。采用合并逻辑回归比较事件发生率，并通过多变量模型调整潜在混杂因素。 结果：分析基于1396名队列参与者的8708人年随访数据：其中1283人（92%）为女性，567人（41%）为黑人，665人（48%）为白人。患者按过去一年他汀类药物使用情况分层：未使用、低于标准限定日剂量、或≥标准限定日剂量。三组每1000人年的事件发生率分别为5.3、8.5和8.0（p=0.31），提示他汀治疗可能缺乏保护作用。在调整总胆固醇水平并分层后，他汀使用者与非使用者之间的心血管事件发生率仍无差异（p=0.18）。体重指数25-30 kg/m²（p=0.0066）及每日服用≥10 mg泼尼松（p=0.0003）的患者心血管事件发生率显著更高。多变量分析亦提示他汀类药物对心血管事件可能缺乏保护作用（OR 1.48；95% CI 0.79-2.75；p=0.21883），而糖尿病与心血管事件风险增加独立相关（OR 4.48；95% CI 1.99-10.08；p=0.00029）。 结论与相关性：在系统性红斑狼疮患者中，无论他汀暴露程度如何，其使用可能对心血管事件的一级预防无保护作用。单变量分析显示，泼尼松使用、糖尿病史及体重指数升高是心血管风险增加的驱动因素。多变量模型中，糖尿病仍为心血管事件的独立危险因素。本研究强化了临床试验的发现：他汀类药物未能减少系统性红斑狼疮患者亚临床动脉粥样硬化指标，且机制性子研究证实他汀无法逆转系统性红斑狼疮诱导的促动脉粥样硬化改变。

papers.title: Robustness of Wolbachia-mediated incompatible-insect technique to future climate change scenarios
papers.translated_title: Wolbachia介导的不育昆虫技术对未来气候变化情景的稳健性
papers.author: Geng, L.
papers.summary: Wolbachia-mediated incompatible-insect technique (IIT) via wAlbB, wMel or wPip/wAlbA/wAlbB strains are promising approaches for suppressing wildtype Aedes mosquitoes and therefore Aedes-borne diseases. Yet, the effectiveness of this technique under climate change remains uncertain. Here, we evaluate the long-term robustness of male Wolbachia-infected mosquito releases to suppress wildtype Aedes aegypti and Ae. albopictus populations across future climate scenarios across diverse geographical regions. We compiled large publicly available datasets on Aedes abundance across Singapore, China, the European Union and the United States, historical and projected climatic conditions in these regions and conducted experiments to test the thermal stability of cytoplasmic incompatibility in Wolbachia-infected male Aedes aegypti and albopictus. A climatically-driven entomological model was developed and calibrated using a Bayesian approach to model observed Aedes population dynamics and infer area-specific climate-driven variation in mosquito life-history traits. We back-inferred historical mosquito abundance and projected mosquito abundance in future climate change scenarios incorporating experimental and locally inferred entomological parameters and then simulated the counterfactual implementation of IIT in these regions. We find that Aedes populations are projected to increase in most regions across all climate change scenarios from 2050-2100 even under high heat conditions in the absence of interventions. While we found that IIT can suppress wild-type populations effectively across all future scenarios and in high heat conditions, effectiveness was found to depend heavily on mosquito emigration rates, overflooding ratios, release intervals and release strategies Extensive robustness checks confirmed that the model reproduced historical temporal trends, captured the influence of individual parameters on outcome and was sensitive to changes in values of inferred parameters and implement policy. These findings demonstrate that IIT may be a robust vector control tool under future climate conditions.
papers.translated_summary: 通过wAlbB、wMel或wPip/wAlbA/wAlbB菌株介导的沃尔巴克氏体不相容昆虫技术（IIT）是抑制野生型伊蚊及蚊媒疾病的有效方法。然而，气候变化下该技术的有效性仍不确定。本研究评估了在不同地理区域未来气候情景下，释放感染沃尔巴克氏体的雄性蚊子对抑制野生型埃及伊蚊和白纹伊蚊种群的长期稳健性。我们整合了新加坡、中国、欧盟和美国公开的大型伊蚊丰度数据集及历史与预测气候条件，并通过实验测试了感染沃尔巴克氏体的雄性埃及伊蚊和白纹伊蚊胞质不相容性的热稳定性。基于贝叶斯方法开发并校准了气候驱动的昆虫学模型，以模拟观测到的伊蚊种群动态并推断区域特异性气候驱动的蚊虫生活史特征变化。通过反推历史蚊虫丰度并纳入实验与局部推断的昆虫学参数，预测了未来气候变化情景下的蚊虫丰度，随后模拟了这些区域实施IIT的反事实情景。研究发现，在无干预措施的情况下，即使面临高温条件，2050-2100年间所有气候变化情景下多数区域的伊蚊种群预计将增加。尽管IIT在所有未来情景及高温条件下均能有效抑制野生型种群，但其有效性高度依赖蚊虫迁出率、超量释放比、释放间隔和释放策略。广泛的稳健性检验证实，模型能复现历史时间趋势、捕捉个体参数对结果的影响，并对推断参数值及政策实施的变化敏感。这些结果表明，IIT在未来气候条件下可能是一种稳健的媒介控制工具。
